definition: Describing a state characterized by the absence of recognition.
notes: The project follows the style guide in preferring non-recognition because it preserves the lexical tie to saññā and keeps the analysis precise. Unconscious is too broad and imports modern assumptions that do not reliably match doctrinal context.

context_rules.context: In most doctrinal and analytical contexts

context_rules.notes: Useful when the privative structure needs to be explicit.

context_rules.context: In discussions of technical meditative or cosmological states
context_rules.notes: Acceptable when a more adjectival English form reads better.

example_phrases.notes: Shows the term in a doctrinal compound.
